prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Celestia Vale in a worn travel dress and Ren Ashbell in reinforced leather armor; Celestia gracefully spreads a weathered quest map across a wooden tavern table while Ren leans in, placing a hand on the table to help anchor it. Warm amber lighting, steady medium shot, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren points to a specific location on the map with a confident nod, and Celestia smiles, placing her hand over Ren's on the map in a gesture of mutual respect and relief after their mission. Consistent identities and camera, no text, no watermark.
